creator: Bret Taylor

evidence.text: (00:35:10): But I say that because I think that whether AI is writing code or doing the design or doing all these other things, you need to learn how to have a system in your head. You need to understand the basics of what's hard and what's easy and what's possible and what's impossible. And AI can help you do that too, by the way. But I do think that's a really useful skill. I think in general, with the advent of AI agents and AI approaching super intelligence in certain domains, I think the tools with which we do our job will change a lot.
